'''鈭歭-ng-f-th''' ('''kalangfethoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:qualm|qualm]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-ng-f-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:qualm|qualm]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歭-ng-f-th
|-
! Lemma
| kalangfethoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thilangfethoko|thilangfethoko]] || [[word:jilangfethoko|jilangfethoko]] || [[word:shilangfethoko|shilangfethoko]] || [[word:kilangfethoko|kilangfethoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthulangfethoko|thuthulangfethoko]] || [[word:jujulangfethoko|jujulangfethoko]] || [[word:shushulangfethoko|shushulangfethoko]] || [[word:kukulangfethoko|kukulangfethoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thulangfethoko|thulangfethoko]] || [[word:julangfethoko|julangfethoko]] || [[word:shulangfethoko|shulangfethoko]] || [[word:kulangfethoko|kulangfethoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:tholangfethoko|tholangfethoko]] || [[word:jolangfethoko|jolangfethoko]] || [[word:sholangfethoko|sholangfethoko]] || [[word:kolangfethoko|kolangfethoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙langfethoko|th忙langfethoko]] || [[word:j忙langfethoko|j忙langfethoko]] || [[word:sh忙langfethoko|sh忙langfethoko]] || [[word:k忙langfethoko|k忙langfethoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathalangfethoko|thathalangfethoko]] || [[word:jajalangfethoko|jajalangfethoko]] || [[word:shashalangfethoko|shashalangfethoko]] || [[word:kakalangfethoko|kakalangfethoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thalangfethoko|thalangfethoko]] || [[word:jalangfethoko|jalangfethoko]] || [[word:shalangfethoko|shalangfethoko]] || [[word:kalangfethoko|kalangfethoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thalangfethoko|thalangfethoko]] || [[word:jalangfethoko|jalangfethoko]] || [[word:shalangfethoko|shalangfethoko]] || [[word:kalangfethoko|kalangfethoko]]
|}
